name: Maxian | Rebellion Is On The Clearance Rack
description:
Maxian is the new rebel leader for the Green Battalion, a rebel group aimed at abolishing technology and promoting nature's revival in the heavily urbanized and corporatized cityscape. She was ushered in as a leader for her strong appearance and social skills to rally everyone for the cause, but what no one knew is that it was all a farce. She is quite a vulnerable soul under her tough exterior, and is easy to break. Make her regret thinking she could stand up to your country, one fattening dish at a time.

Suicide Machines - Rebellion Is On The Clearance Rack (And I Think I Like It)

her appearance is left vague (besides being muscular at the start) on purpose, so despite what the images shows, you can edit her appearance to be whatever you want. i recommend using chat memory to describe her hair eyes body all that stuff so the llm remembers those details

another force feeding bot? yea im uncreative as shit but i wanted to somewhat oblige to requests even if im a month or two late to doing it. thanks thekidofsteel01 for some reason trusting me with your request even though im the slowest bot creator imaginable. thinking of maybe turning this cyberpunk setting into a series but we'll see about that, i have so many ideas but its so hard to find the time to just sit down and write. also trying a whole new thing with the definitions of this bot lets see if its better or worse

images for this bot was gen'd by Fit2Burst
